creator: wolson@gmail.com
text:
This one fails due to failure in
bglibs, see output:
-------
===>  Patching for qmail-autoresponder-0.96.2
===>   qmail-autoresponder-0.96.2 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/bglibs/libbg.a - not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/lib/bglibs/libbg.a in
/usr/ports/devel/bglibs
===>  bglibs-1.101 is marked as broken: Fails self-tests.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/bglibs.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/qmail-autoresponder.

Fix: 

No idea how to fix
How-To-Repeat: I did a make clean && make install clean
